column1: # Custom 16MB partition table for MotoTrak (LilyGo T-SIM7000G
# 3MB app partition (with OTA headroom via app0/app1)
# for LittleFS debug logging (V7.61+). The "spiffs" subtype below is what
# LittleFS.begin() looks for - do not change it to "fat"/FATFS or the
# logger will fail to mount even though space is reserved.
